headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 5, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox dominated the Detroit Tigers, securing a 10-3 victory. Ceddanne Rafaela led the Red Sox offense with 3 hits, including a home run, and 4 RBIs. The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 4-3 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Casey Legumina earning the win. Cole Sulser closed out the game with a save. The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Athletics in a one-sided game, winning 9-1. Bryce Harper led the Phillies' offense with three hits, including two home runs and three RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. Drew Thorpe, a right-hander for the Chicago White Sox, has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to his ongoing recovery from Tommy John surgery. Other players on the injured list include Jake Cronenworth of the San Diego Padres, Yainer Diaz of the Houston Astros, Ramón Urías of the St. Louis Cardinals, Josh Smith of the Texas Rangers, Steven Matz of the Tampa Bay Rays, Gabe Speier of the Seattle Mariners, and Erik Miller of the San Francisco Giants.

The Chicago White Sox have bolstered their roster with the addition of right-handed pitcher Trevor Richards, who was traded to the team from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash. Richards joins the White Sox in a move that aims to strengthen the team's pitching depth.

top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Athletics in a one-sided game, winning 9-1. Bryce Harper led the Phillies' offense with three hits, including two home runs and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Marlins in Thrilling 9-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a hard-fought win against the Miami Marlins, outscoring them 9-7. Liam Hicks led the Orioles' offense with a standout performance, going 4 for 5 with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **White Sox RHP Drew Thorpe Shifts to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Chicago White Sox right-hander Drew Thorpe has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to his ongoing recovery from Tommy John surgery.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Trevor Richards in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have bolstered their roster with the addition of right-handed pitcher Trevor Richards, who was traded to the team from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash. Richards joins the White Sox in a move that aims to strengthen the team's pitching depth.
